title.en: Homer's Wine-Dark Sea — Why No Word for Blue?

subtitle.en: Homer described the sea as 'wine-dark' (oínops) and sheep as 'violet' — Gladstone 1858 catalogued the absence of 'blue' in Homeric Greek, sparking the entire field of colour-term anthropology
subtitle.ko: 호머는 바다를 '포도주빛', 양을 '제비꽃빛'으로 — Gladstone 1858이 청색 부재 문제 제기

description.en: Aegean sea coloured by Homeric epithet vs modern blue. Berlin-Kay stage IV — Homer's Greek lacked a basic blue term.
description.ko: Homer 형용사 vs 현대 청색의 Aegean 바다. B&K stage IV — 청색 기본어 없음.
